password or username issue.description: Problems with passwords, usernames, login credentials, or account lockouts.

trouble verifying identity.description: Issues with identity verification, including not receiving codes or failing authentication steps.

account not found error.description: Cases where the system cannot locate a user account, member record, or enrollment.

missing account setup details.description: Questions about required information or missing details needed to create or access an account.

accessing plan details.description: Questions about how to view benefits, balances, plan information, or documents online or in an app.

document access or delivery issues.description: Problems receiving, opening, or accessing plan documents or communications through email, links, or digital platforms.

website account registration.description: Problems or questions related to creating or registering an account on the website.

website showing error message.description: Errors encountered while using the website, including failed submissions or invalid input messages.

website hyperlink not working.description: Problems with links on the website that are broken, looping, expired, or not opening correctly.

website not responding.description: Cases where the website is slow, frozen, crashing, or not loading properly.

website missing benefits.description: Cases where expected benefits, plan details, or information are missing from the website.

website navigation.description: Difficulty finding information or completing tasks on the website.

website claim info incorrect.description: Cases where claim information displayed on the website is incorrect, inconsistent, or does not match expectations.

website locating or submitting claim.description: Problems finding, submitting, or tracking claims on the website.

website card access.description: Issues accessing, viewing, or retrieving a digital ID or benefits card on the website.

website id card ordering.description: Problems ordering, requesting, or receiving an ID card through the website.

app account registration.description: Problems or questions related to creating or registering an account in the mobile app.

app showing error message.description: Errors encountered while using the mobile app, including failed actions or invalid input messages.

app hyperlink not working.description: Problems with links within the mobile app that are broken, looping, or not working properly.

app not responding.description: Cases where the mobile app is slow, frozen, crashing, or not functioning properly.

app missing benefits.description: Cases where expected benefits, plan details, or information are missing from the mobile app.

app navigation.description: Difficulty finding information or completing tasks within the mobile app.

app claim info incorrect.description: Cases where claim information displayed in the app is incorrect, inconsistent, or does not match expectations.

app locating or submitting claim.description: Problems finding, submitting, or tracking claims in the mobile app.

app card access.description: Issues accessing, viewing, or retrieving a digital ID or benefits card in the mobile app.

app id card ordering.description: Problems ordering, requesting, or receiving an ID card through the mobile app.
